title: Electrology
description: Electrology is a modpack that focuses on automation, technology, and exploration. It is based on the Mekanism, Applied Energistics 2 and Create Mod and includes a variety of other mods that add new features and mechanics to the game. Modpack by gg265.
body:
# Electrology
Electrology is a Minecraft modpack that takes both beginners and experienced players into the fascinating world of engineering. With the core mods Create, Mekanism and Applied Energistics 2 you can unleash your creativity and create complex, high-tech systems. Whether you want to build huge automated factories, develop innovative energy sources or just relax and tinker with your machines. 

With the new custom ingot, Finisarium, you have a goal to compleate the modpack.

The possibilities are almost endless. Immerse yourself in the world of automation and conquer the challenges of automated material processing.


## Community
To join our community or report a bug you can join our Discord Server.

[JLCraft Discord Server](https://discord.gg/9HQeX3NdAb)
